General.Name: Rimbaco Group Global Ltd
General.Description: Rimbaco Group Global Limited, an investment holding company, provides general contractor services in Malaysia. It offers construction services for factories, including low-rise processing facilities and manufacturing plants; institutional, commercial, and/or residential buildings, such as private hospitals, hotels, shopping malls, high-rise residential buildings, and commercial/residential complexes; and infrastructure works. The company also undertakes small-scale ancillary construction works, including renovation, repair, and electrical works; and rents construction equipment. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Jelutong, Malaysia. Rimbaco Group Global Limited is a subsidiary of RBC Venture Limited.
